# @upflame/installer-core

Installer and bootstrap primitives shared by:

- `create-json-cms`
- `@upflame/json-cms` postinstall bootstrap

## Scope

- framework registry and detection helpers
- project intelligence signals (framework candidates + workspace topology)
- dependency planning for adapter + plugin composition
- config resolution utilities (`cms.config.ts` canonical with legacy fallback)
- scaffold and bootstrap safety policy utilities
